title: UK NSC Blood Spot Task Group January 2025 meeting summary
body: "The UK National Screening Committee (UK NSC) set up the blood spot task group (BSTG) to identify practical and innovative approaches to help researchers and others develop evidence that can help the committee make good recommendations.  BSTG discussions feed into policy development and are therefore confidential. These summary notes have been prepared for sharing more widely for input and discussion by interested stakeholders.   Email uknsc@dhsc.gov.uk if you have any queries about this publication, making sure you include its full title.   "

taxons.title: NHS newborn blood spot (NBS) screening programme
